title: Naive Bayes Text Classification Process
description: A flowchart illustrating how a Naive Bayes classifier processes text for sentiment analysis or spam detection, highlighting the 'naive' assumption of feature independence.
relationships: Training Data flows into Feature Extraction
Feature Extraction provides input for Prior and Conditional Probability calculations
New Input Document is processed through Feature Extraction
Extracted features and calculated probabilities are used by the Classifier to make a Prediction
